regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces escalating military confrontation as the April 22 ceasefire expires with US deploying a third carrier strike group and 10,000+ additional troops, while Tehran simultaneously manages an acute succession crisis, economic collapse accelerating from blockade pressures, and failed diplomatic breakthrough attempts in Pakistan despite reconstruction of 70% military capacity.
regime_fall.last_major_event: The US-Iran ceasefire expired on April 22, 2026, with the US deploying a third aircraft carrier strike group (USS George HW Bush) and 10,000+ additional troops to the Middle East while Iran rejected talks under threat and warned of military escalation options.
